/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -g -DNDEBUG -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/bh_app.dir/src/app/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bh_app.dir/src/app/Window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bh_app.dir/src/render/Renderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bh_app.dir/src/render/TextureLoader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bh_app.dir/src/render/stb_impl.cpp.o CMakeFiles/bh_app.dir/src/ui/ImGuiLayer.cpp.o -o bh_app  libbh_sim.a _deps/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a _deps/glm-build/glm/libglm.a libimgui.a -framework OpenGL -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreVideo libbh_physics.a _deps/glm-build/glm/libglm.a _deps/glfw-build/src/libglfw3.a -framework Cocoa -framework IOKit -framework CoreFoundation
